scenes.description: Takane Lui appears on stage in a 3D environment for an introductory talk before the song begins.
Takane Lui and other performers sing and dance to 'Mugen Climax'. The song is a high-energy pop track.
Takane Lui speaks to the audience, reflecting on the performance and mentioning upcoming content.
